feed.title: AO3 - Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski (Filtered)

entry.title: Time After Time
entry.summary:
Author: anarchycox

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 54,346Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 703

Summary: Talia told Noah about werewolves and the supernatural when he was elected Sheriff. He warned her that was a mistake and she didn't understand why, until she realized that that meant ten year old Stiles knew about werewolves. God help them all. A soft and slow burn story about the Stilinskis finding out about the supernatural much earlier than in canon and what happens when you give Stiles wild magic, and Noah becomes an accidental human alpha.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Obsessed
entry.summary:
Author: Almaie

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,196Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 7

Summary: Stiles Stilinski dies in an accident involving his boyfriend, Derek Hale. He is reborn and sent back nine years. To save his future self, he avoids Derek and his feelings for him. The problem is that Stiles has loved Derek for a long time and has written about him in his diary. While destroying the diary, Derek discovers a few pages, which piques his curiosity about Stiles. Will Stiles resist the love of the handsome man and save his future self, or will he fall for the same man twice and risk his life?

entry.title: you just can't stop leaving, can you?
entry.summary:
Author: lonelyBoneflower

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,462Chapters: 6/10Kudos: 25

Summary: He was a stranger. Just some sullen guy we ran into in the woods while looking for the inhaler my best friend relied on as if it were his very lifeline. And then, one day, we stood side by side, as if it were the most natural thing in the world. Derek was a stranger, yet when he stood with us, it felt entirely natural. Perhaps, from the very beginning, my heart had recognized him as a man worthy of trust—even if my mind was much slower to catch up to that truth. After the events of the movie, Stiles returns to town. [Alternate story for Teen Wolf The Movie]

entry.title: Fifty Bucks to Die
entry.summary:
Author: redandblue

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 39,137Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 65

Summary: To destroy a deadly drug cartel, agent Derek Hale goes undercover as a desperate junkie. But when college kid Stiles stumbles into a deal, Derek must maintain the dangerous act to save the boy's life. Warning: Contains depictions of drug use! Sterek AU

entry.title: Godzina Duchow
entry.summary:
Author: AgMercy

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,285Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 26

Summary: Derek walks up to the little shop on the corner. It’s far more…cheery than he thought a witch’s apothecary would be. More like a green house. The walls are almost entirely glass—a stark contrast to the brick storefronts lining the street—and give full view of the plants bursting with life inside. The place is so packed with greenery that you can’t actually see anything else in the shop. It even spills out to the sidewalk, with lush ferns and brightly flowering bushes taking up half the space. Even the wooden sign hanging over the doorway has a blossoming clematis vine wrapped around it and covering half the words. The part of it he can read says Godzina in fine purple script. The peculiarity of the name is the only identifier that this is the place Deaton was asking him to go to. Knowing the older witch and how he liked to keep things under wraps, Derek is beginning to understand why he didn’t want to come himself.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,874Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 6

entry.summary:

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,437Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 23

entry.title: Rewrite Your History
entry.summary:
Author: StormyBlack

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,858Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 87

Summary: It was definitely not possible for Scott to have just said those words. "What?" Stiles asked again, because what else was he supposed to do? It wasn't possible. It just wasn't. "I said I don't think I can handle your fragile self anymore," Scott repeated. "You complain about everything. Everything hurts you. I don't know what to do anymore. Everything in this world will continue to hurt you. You can't protect yourself, so I'm always down a hand, because someone constantly has to be on 'Stiles duty.' You need to be babysat, and I can't afford to lose someone every time there's a threat in this city, because it happens a lot. And you keep putting yourself at risk. I don't know how to deal with this anymore. It's getting tiring."

entry.title: Another Poly Story
entry.summary:
Author: HolmesMoriarty

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,117Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 170

Summary: “That’s what I wanted to talk to you about.” Stiles’ world falls apart after hearing this. It was a normal day, like any other, when his boyfriend of five years prepared a meal for them inside their apartment. Stiles thought he would be getting engaged tonight because he had never seen Derek cook even once. It was always Stiles’ thing, so he expected something, but not that.... “Stiles?” Derek asks as Stiles is frozen in place. His boyfriend sighs. “You don’t like the idea.” Of course, Stiles doesn’t!!! “What... Derek.” He closes his eyes, trying to breathe correctly. “Where is this coming from?” Derek opens his mouth, but Stiles isn’t done. “We’ve been together for five years, not once you expressed that you might be polyamorous. Not even once. So, you, asking out of the blue to open our relationship, doesn’t make much sense.”

entry.title: Rust, Dust, and Your Eyes
entry.summary:
Author: Dino_Laurus_Rex

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,247Chapters: 20/75Kudos: 43

Summary: Seven years of unspoken words, hidden truths, and a bond forged in the shadows of Beacon Hills. ​Now, hidden away in a secluded bunker, Stiles Stilinski is completely on his own, carrying a secret pregnancy that connects him forever to the Hale lineage. As he looks back on the chaotic history that brought him here, he prepares for the hardest choice of his life—and the ultimate sacrifice made out of love. _______ Or just my version of the sterek ship.

entry.summary:

Summary: “I didn’t realize I stepped into a museum,” Stiles says, letting his eyes drop and admire the tight cuffs of the man’s white t-shirt hugging his thick arms. He wants to reach up and squeeze them, and he does, letting his thumb brush over the field of hair hiding solid muscles packed under a soft layer of fat Stiles could sink his teeth into.
